issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios and edge cases beyond basic async error handling.
Only one code example is provided, falling short of the required two realistic demonstrations.

scenarios.name: Async fetchTodos with loading state
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tends to use legacy @observable/@action decorators or skips runInAction after await; treatment uses makeAutoObservable, runInAction in both success and catch branches, and direct mutation as the skill prescribes.

scenarios.name: Observer component with document.title side effect
scenarios.rationale: Baseline writes a plain React component with useEffect and often destructures observables outside observer, breaking tracking; treatment wraps the component in observer(), accesses store.stats.remaining directly, and uses reaction() for the title side effect.
